audit_items.proof_trace: The header file rpc_channel.h contains no raw pointer dereferences in its inline code. The only inline methods are RpcChannelOptions() (initializes int64/uint32 primitives, no pointers) and impl() (returns a shared_ptr<RpcChannelImpl> reference, not a raw dereference). All constructor and CallMethod overloads with raw pointer parameters are declarations only; their implementations reside in rpc_channel.cc.
